subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the All-Dominating, the Self-Subsisting. I have presented myself before the Gate and hearkened unto the Call from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم قد حضرت لدی الباب و سمعت الندآء من
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
